datasync.locationfsxlustre.CfnAbout: The `AWS::DataSync::LocationFSxLustre` resource specifies an endpoint for an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system.

datasync.locationfsxlustre.FsxFilesystem.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the FSx for Lustre file system.

datasync.locationfsxlustre.SecurityGroup.Description: The ARNs of the security groups that are used to configure the FSx for Lustre file system.

datasync.locationfsxlustre.Subdirectory.Description: A subdirectory in the location's path. This subdirectory in the FSx for Lustre file system is used to read data from the FSx for Lustre source location or write data to the FSx for Lustre destination.

datasync.locationfsxlustre.Tags.Description: The key-value pair that represents a tag that you want to add to the resource. The value can be an empty string. This value helps you manage, filter, and search for your resources. We recommend that you create a name tag for your location.
